cluster_samples.cluster_title: LM Performance：With only 27B parameters, Qwen3.6-27B outperforms the Qwen3.5-397B-A17B (397B total /...
core_facts: LM Performance：With only 27B parameters, Qwen3.6-27B outperforms the Qwen3.5-397B-A17B (397B total / 17B active, ~15x larger!) on every major coding benchmark — including SWE-bench Verified (77.2 vs. 76.2), SWE-bench Pro (53.5 vs. 50.9), Terminal-Bench 2.0 (59.3 vs. 52.5), and SkillsBench (48.2 vs. 30.0). It also surpasses all peer-scale dense models by a w…

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Critique of government Innovation Centers
core_facts: You can't get the same effect from the Innovation Center set up by the provincial government. You have to fill out forms to get space there, it's locked at night, and you can't make holes in the walls. You might even have to deal with bureaucrats hired to help you.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: History of tensor engine naming conventions

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Technical deep dive on RLHF precision mismatch
core_facts: Thomas Wolf and Amine Dirhoussi present a deep dive into a numerical precision issue in RLHF when training in FP32 and inference in BF16. They decompose the importance sampling ratio into policy change and precision gap, finding that the precision gap is structured and correlated with advantage, but disabling clipping resolves the issue.

core_facts: Windsurf promotes GPT-5.5, claiming it is a giant leap for handling ambiguity and key for long-horizon tasks in parallel agents.

prompt_iteration_notes.notes: No enum expansion; prompt JSON contracts remain stable.

reasons: Use dry-run reports for manual review before write-real-db.
Candidate recall is still lexical/entity/time/source hybrid, not vector-indexed.
9 LLM failures observed in this run.

recommendations: Review uncertain relations and tune prompts with real examples.
Add vector indexes for item_cards and cluster_cards before larger runs.
Keep primary relation enum unchanged for now; it covered Phase 1.1 control flow.
Collect more source_signals before trusting source_profile priority suggestions.
Run a larger dry-run before any write-real-db semantic pass.
